thread.speaker: code-audit
thread.text: HANDOFF excerpt: # HANDOFF_TO_PENTEST — Static Code Audit Results **From:** code-audit (static review) **To:** application security (pentest) **Case:** collab-playbook-b · station 2 **Date:** 2026-07-16 --- ## Summary Static review of the `source_dump/` fixture tree identified **3 confirmed vulnerable sinks**. All require **runtime verification** on the lab host to confirm exploitability and impact. findings_summary.title: IDOR in orders API — no ownership check on order_id (CWE-639)
SSRF in fetch API — user-supplied URL reaches outbound HTTP (CWE-918)
SQL Injection in search API via unsanitized q parameter (CWE-89)
